description: Dynamic drill-down for every automatically observed DefenseClaw agent. Stable agent/root/parent/lifecycle/execution IDs correlate Prometheus inventory and totals, Loki event detail, and Tempo traces.

options.content:
# Agent360 · `$agent`
Stable identity → lifecycle/executions → models, tools, websites, security decisions → Tempo trace. **Scope** chooses only this agent or its full descendant tree. The hook recovery section distinguishes enforced blocks from observe-mode would-blocks and shows the following agent path. Unknown tokens/cost remain absent rather than being rendered as zero.

panels.title: Agent Directory — click an Agent ID to drill down
panels.description: Every hook lifecycle transition updates defenseclaw.agent.last_seen. This table therefore discovers new agents automatically; no dashboard JSON is generated per agent.

panels.title: Turns
panels.description: Completed turns counted from the durable lifecycle event stream, so collector restarts and sparse counter samples do not erase the total.

panels.title: Model calls
panels.description: Model responses counted from the durable LLM event stream. This includes intermediate responses that do not close the overall agent turn.

panels.title: Tool calls
panels.description: Completed tool results counted from the durable tool event stream. Post-only hook connectors remain visible even when no matching pre-hook was observed.

panels.title: Input tokens
panels.description: Connector-reported prompt/context tokens from completed model calls. Long-context agents can report much more input than output. Missing usage is absent, not guessed.

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Connector-reported completion tokens from completed model calls. Missing usage is absent, not guessed.

panels.title: Reported cost
panels.description: Latest cumulative USD cost only when the connector explicitly reports it. DefenseClaw does not estimate prices.

panels.title: Terminal success
panels.description: Completed terminal lifecycle events divided by completed, failed, and interrupted terminal events in Loki. Active-only ranges correctly remain without a terminal outcome.

panels.title: Execution phase timeline
panels.description: Continuous per-execution state from the native phase gauge. Values persist between scrapes, while the ordered sequence below retains every sub-scrape transition.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, span_name) ((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))))

panels.title: Input/output tokens over time
panels.description: Rolling one-hour reported token increments. A fixed window keeps completed model calls visible after their short-lived lifecycle series stop exporting.

panels.title: Model, tool, cost, lifecycle, and reliability analytics
Model calls by provider and model
panels.description: Durable LLM response events grouped by the provider/model actually reported by the connector. Missing model identity is shown as unreported rather than guessed.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, model) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | $scope_label=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type="llm_response" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | label_format model="{{if .model}}{{.model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Execution-lifetime model p95 (active in range)
panels.description: Cumulative p95 for executions with activity in the selected range. Execution-scoped histogram state keeps sparse and single-call agents visible without mixing in inactive executions.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) ((last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_request_model!="",gen_ai_operation_name=~"chat|generate_content|text_completion"}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))))

panels.title: Top tools by calls
panels.description: Exact result-event counts in the selected time range; duplicate counter state from older executions is excluded.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | $scope_label=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type="tool_invocation" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | tool_invocation_phase="result" | tool_name!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Execution-lifetime tool p95 (active in range)
panels.description: Cumulative p95 for tool executions with activity in the selected range. Execution-scoped histogram state keeps one-off tools visible.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, gen_ai_tool_name) ((last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_tool_name!=""}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s)))))

panels.title: Top websites and destinations
panels.description: Destination applications inferred from tool and network spans; raw host detail remains in Loki.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (destination) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | $scope_label=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type=~"tool_invocation|egress" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | label_format destination="{{if .destination_app}}{{.destination_app}}{{else}}{{.destination_host}}{{end}}" | destination!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Reported tokens by model
panels.description: Only connector-reported token usage. New observations carry provider/model labels; missing usage is not estimated.

panels.title: Reported cost over time
panels.description: Latest cumulative connector-reported USD total per lifecycle; no price-table estimate is introduced.

panels.title: Reported cost by model
panels.description: Cumulative reported cost grouped by the model/provider carried by the lifecycle observation.

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) (max by (gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id, gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_USD{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Lifecycle funnel
panels.description: Exact lifecycle event totals from Loki. This remains accurate across collector restarts and includes sparse pre/post hook transitions.

targets.expr: 100 * (sum((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))) or vector(0)), 0.000000001)

panels.title: Active agents over time
panels.description: Distinct agents observed in each dashboard interval.

panels.title: Models, tools, websites, and security decisions
LLM turns — prompts, responses, model, usage
panels.description: Inputs/outputs render only when privacy policy permits and the connector supplied them.

panels.title: Tools and website/network interactions
panels.description: Tool name, destination app, arguments/result, and network egress metadata remain trace-correlated.

panels.title: Errors, blocks, approvals, and guardrail decisions
panels.description: Canonical errors, scanner verdicts, judges, findings, and final connector-facing hook decisions. A hook decision says whether the block was enforced or only would have blocked.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | $scope_label=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type=~"error|verdict|judge|scan_finding|hook_decision" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | line_format "{{.event_type}} · {{.severity}} · hook={{.hook_decision_event}} action={{.hook_decision_action}} raw={{.hook_decision_raw_action}} enforced={{.hook_decision_enforced}} would_block={{.hook_decision_would_block}} · {{if .hook_decision_reason}}{{printf \"%.320s\" .hook_decision_reason}}{{else if .reason}}{{printf \"%.320s\" .reason}}{{else}}{{printf \"%.320s\" .message}}{{end}}"

panels.title: Enforced hook blocks
panels.description: Final hook decisions actually returned as block to the connector. This is distinct from a scanner verdict that was downgraded by observe mode or an unsupported hook surface.

panels.title: Observe-mode would-blocks
panels.description: Guardrail decisions that would have blocked but were returned as an allowed/advisory outcome because the connector is in observe mode or the hook surface cannot enforce.

panels.title: Hook action outcomes over time
panels.description: Decision time-series for the selected agent execution. Use this to see when enforcement started, whether blocks were only advisory, and whether approvals/alerts occurred before the next attempt.

panels.title: Decision → recovery path
panels.description: Ascending, execution-scoped chronology. Find a hook_decision, then read the next rows: a later tool call/result, model prompt/response, lifecycle completion, or another hook decision is the observed recovery path. A missing later row means DefenseClaw did not observe a subsequent hook event in this execution.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | $scope_label=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type=~"hook_decision|tool_invocation|llm_prompt|llm_response|lifecycle|verdict|judge|error" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | line_format "#{{.agent_sequence}} · {{.event_type}} · phase={{.agent_phase}} · hook={{.hook_decision_event}} action={{.hook_decision_action}} raw={{.hook_decision_raw_action}} enforced={{.hook_decision_enforced}} would_block={{.hook_decision_would_block}} · tool={{.tool_name}} · model={{.model}} · trace={{.trace_id}}"

panels.title: Operation and enforcement traces — click a Trace ID
panels.description: Shows completed model/tool/session operations and hook attempts that returned block, confirm, or alert. Clicking Trace ID carries the selected connector, agent, scope, lifecycle, and execution into the waterfall without forwarding an empty trace variable.

targets.query: { (("$scope_label" = "gen_ai_agent_id" && span.gen_ai.agent.id = "$agent") || ("$scope_label" = "defenseclaw_agent_root_id" && span.defenseclaw.agent.root.id = "$agent")) && ((span.gen_ai.operation.name =~ "invoke_agent|execute_tool|chat|generate_content|text_completion" && span.defenseclaw.agent.lifecycle.event =~ "tool_end|turn_end|session_end|subagent_stop") || span.defenseclaw.raw_action =~ "block|confirm" || span.defenseclaw.decision =~ "block|confirm|alert") } with (most_recent=true)

panels.title: Selected trace waterfall — choose a Trace ID on the left
panels.description: The selected completed operation or enforcement attempt renders as an ordered parent/child waterfall. Use the trace panel's built-in node graph and span detail tabs for the individual request.

panels.title: Ordered execution sequence — every hook transition
panels.description: Ascending per-execution sequence. This retains planning, model, tool, approval, waiting, response, completion, and failure transitions even when several happen between Prometheus scrapes.

panels.title: Average observed phase duration
panels.description: Average completed span duration grouped by the canonical phase carried on runtime spans.

targets.expr: sum by (defenseclaw_agent_phase) ((increase(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_sum{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_phase!=""}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))) / clamp_min(sum by (defenseclaw_agent_phase) ((increase(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_count{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_phase!=""}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))), 1)

panels.title: Slowest operation classes (p95)
panels.description: The slowest span classes in the selected agent tree, split by phase so model/tool bottlenecks are immediately visible.

targets.expr: topk(12, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, span_name, defenseclaw_agent_phase) ((increase(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s)))))

panels.title: Execution phase network
panels.description: Observed source → target transitions across the selected execution scope. Edge values are real transition counts; use the adjacent directed-edge table when reciprocal edges overlap visually.

panels.title: Directed phase edges (source → target)
panels.description: Explicit direction and transition count for every edge in the phase network. This disambiguates reciprocal transitions such as planning → tool and tool → planning.

panels.title: Aggregate dependency map — agents, subagents, models, and tools
panels.description: Cross-trace structural topology, not a timeline. Edges aggregate observed parentage and model/tool dependencies for the selected agent tree.

targets.expr: label_join(label_replace(label_replace(max by (gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_parent_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_parent_id!="none",defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle",defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution"}[$__range])), "source", "$1", "defenseclaw_agent_parent_id", "(.+)"), "target", "$1", "gen_ai_agent_id", "(.+)"), "id", " → ", "defenseclaw_agent_parent_id", "gen_ai_agent_id") or label_join(label_replace(label_replace(max by (gen_ai_agent_id, gen_ai_tool_name) (increase(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_agent_id!="",gen_ai_tool_name!="",defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle",defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution"}[$__range])), "source", "$1", "gen_ai_agent_id", "(.+)"), "target", "tool:$1", "gen_ai_tool_name", "(.+)"), "id", " → tool: ", "gen_ai_agent_id", "gen_ai_tool_name") or label_join(label_replace(label_replace(max by (gen_ai_agent_id, gen_ai_request_model) (increase(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_agent_id!="",gen_ai_request_model!="",gen_ai_operation_name=~"chat|generate_content|text_completion",defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle",defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution"}[$__range])), "source", "$1", "gen_ai_agent_id", "(.+)"), "target", "model:$1", "gen_ai_request_model", "(.+)"), "id", " → model: ", "gen_ai_agent_id", "gen_ai_request_model")

panels.title: Raw correlated event stream
panels.description: Forensic fallback across every event type. Use the Loki-derived trace_id link to pivot directly to Tempo.

title: DefenseClaw — Agent360
